thesis_hint: Recent quality on the strongest active branch is improving then stable (VVV funding snapback QScore 0.3182 -> 0.5323 -> 0.5323), so exploration is allowed. Target BABY 1h because funding is still extremely negative (-0.00378) while open interest and volume remain elevated; design a post-liquidation squeeze-reclaim long that only enters after a downside flush, reclaim above a fast intraday trend anchor, and confirmation that funding is still deeply negative at signal time. Avoid passive dip-buying, avoid slow mean-reversion holds, and require a hard veto against continuation downtrends.
stop_condition: Stop when any variant reaches QScore >= 1.0 with >= 20 trades and max_drawdown_pct <= 8.0; abort any variant with total_trades < 15, profit_factor < 1.08, or trending regime profit_factor < 0.95.
